title: Clarani
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Clarani |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|The forces need every decent pilot we can get. That's where you ought to be. Even Dad.''"
"''Instead of stuck here, taking care of helpless folks? Think again, young woman. Who were you fighting to save? You're not out there playing death-tag for fun and excitement.|Jaina Solo and Clarani|}} '''Clarani''' was an old [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] refugee [[Gender/Legends|woman]] on [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]].''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' Her [[Clarani's husband|husband]] [[Death/Legends|died]] in the evacuation of the [[Jubilee Wheel (space station)|''Jubilee Wheel'']]. She later bunked in [[Settlement 32]] with [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Clarani |es=Clarani }} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Refugees]] [[Category:Ryn]]
